model.label: representative gomoku15-M evaluator body (not the shipped net)

assumptions: throughput/latency are measured on a representative conv body, not the exact shipped network
inflight credit is realized as one CUDA stream per outstanding batch, synchronized once per wave
power is sampled from nvidia-smi around each point when available (best effort)
prohibited_inferences: a GPU service curve is a CPU-superiority claim
a representative conv body is the exact shipped network
energy numbers are validated without a controlled power measurement
